ddls:
CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the theater is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the theater */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the theater opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the theater closed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the theater */,
  "architecture_style" TEXT /* Style of the theater's architecture */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the theater */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theaters_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theaters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES theater_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the theater type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theater type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., image, article) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_documents_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater the event belongs to */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the historical event has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_history_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the theater data */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the theater data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crowdsourced_data" (
  "crowdsourced_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crowdsourced data point */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., image, article) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the crowdsourced data was uploaded */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the crowdsourced data has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crowdsourced_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdsourced_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdsourced_data_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater the project is related to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON string of collaborator IDs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_versions_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
